title: Sodium X android
description: Optimized modpack for smooth PvP and high FPS on mobile devices.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/r4OLUVimmXU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>This modpack is created with a clear goal in mind: to provide a smooth, optimized, and enjoyable Minecraft experience, especially for mobile and low to mid-range device players. Our aim is to deliver better performance, essential quality-of-life improvements, and clean visual enhancements — all combined into a single, well-balanced modpack.
It is carefully designed to maximize FPS, reduce lag, and improve overall game responsiveness without compromising the core Minecraft experience. Performance-focused mods work together to ensure stable gameplay during PvP, exploration, and regular survival play.
Alongside performance, this modpack includes a variety of quality-of-life features that enhance usability, controls, and interface clarity. These additions make gameplay more comfortable and efficient while maintaining a lightweight and non-intrusive setup.
Visual improvements are kept clean and optimized, enhancing animations, lighting, and overall feel without affecting performance. The result is a polished and modern look that still stays true to Minecraft’s original style.
All mods included in this modpack respect their respective licenses and usage guidelines. Permission has been obtained from the developers of AxolotlClient for inclusion. All other mods have been downloaded from their official pages, and no files have been modified or altered in any harmful way. This ensures a safe, transparent, and reliable experience for all users.
